**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 16 — paragraph 1 — point j a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission



(j a)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

(j a) ensure that the high-risk AI system complies with accessibility requirements.

ensure that the high-risk AI system complies with accessibility requirements.
